def solve(grid, k)

  m = grid.size

  n = grid[0].size if m > 0 else 0

  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }

  for i in 0...m

    for j in 0...n

        # perform BFS

        sum = 0

        queue = [(i, j)]

        visited[i][j] = true

        sum += grid[i][j]

        while queue not empty

          x, y = queue.shift

          directions = [(-1,0), (1,0), (0,-1), (0,1)]

          directions.each do |dx, dy|

            nx = x + dx

            ny = y + dy

            if nx between 0 and m-1 and ny between 0 and n-1 and not visited[nx][ny] and grid[nx][ny] > 0

              visited[nx][ny] = true

              sum += grid[nx][ny]

              queue << [nx, ny]

            end

          end

        end

        if sum % k == 0

          count += 1

        end

      end

    end

  end

  return count

end

  m = grid.size

        queue = [(i, j)]

        visited[i][j] = true

        sum += grid[i][j]

        while queue not empty

          x, y = queue.shift

          directions = [(-1,0), (1,0), (0,-1), (0,1)]

            nx = x + dx

            ny = y + dy

              sum += grid[nx][ny]

              queue << [nx, ny]

            end

          end

        end

        if sum % k == 0

          count += 1

        end

      end

    end

  end

  return count

end
